scripts.monitor:dev:up: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml -f infrastructure/docker/compose.override.yaml --env-file infrastructure/docker/.env.dev --profile dev up -d --build
scripts.monitor:dev:down: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml -f infrastructure/docker/compose.override.yaml --env-file infrastructure/docker/.env.dev --profile dev down
scripts.monitor:dev:reset: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml -f infrastructure/docker/compose.override.yaml --env-file infrastructure/docker/.env.dev --profile dev down --volumes && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml -f infrastructure/docker/compose.override.yaml --env-file infrastructure/docker/.env.dev --profile dev up -d --build
scripts.monitor:prod:up: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml -f infrastructure/docker/compose.prod.yaml --env-file infrastructure/docker/.env.prod --profile prod up -d --build
scripts.monitor:prod:down: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml -f infrastructure/docker/compose.prod.yaml --env-file infrastructure/docker/.env.prod --profile prod down
scripts.monitor:prod:reset: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml -f infrastructure/docker/compose.prod.yaml --env-file infrastructure/docker/.env.prod --profile prod down --volumes && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml -f infrastructure/docker/compose.prod.yaml --env-file infrastructure/docker/.env.prod --profile prod up -d --build
scripts.monitor:staging:up: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml -f infrastructure/docker/compose.prod.yaml --env-file infrastructure/docker/.env.staging --profile staging up -d --build
scripts.monitor:staging:down: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml -f infrastructure/docker/compose.prod.yaml --env-file infrastructure/docker/.env.staging --profile staging down
scripts.monitor:staging:reset: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml -f infrastructure/docker/compose.prod.yaml --env-file infrastructure/docker/.env.staging --profile staging down --volumes && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/compose.yaml -f infrastructure/docker/compose.prod.yaml --env-file infrastructure/docker/.env.staging --profile staging up -d --build
